name: Bear Dance Park
description: Bear Dance Park is a place to play pickleball in New Castle, CO. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Carbondale Recreation and Community Center
description: Carbondale Recreation and Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Carbondale, CO. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Crown Mountain
description: Come play pickleball at Crown Mountain in Carbondale, CO! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Elk Creek Elementary
description: Elk Creek Elementary is a place to play pickleball in New Castle, CO. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Glenwood Springs Community Center
description: Glenwood Springs Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Glenwood Springs, CO. There are 7 hard courts. 4 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Grand Valley Recreation Center
description: Grand Valley Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Parachute, CO. There are 6 asphalt and wood courts. 2 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.

name: Hot Shot Park
description: Come play pickleball at Hot Shot Park in New Castle, CO! There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.
